title: Differential relationship between meditation methods and psychotic-like and mystical experiences.

assets.abstract: Much work has investigated beneficial effects of mindfulness-based meditation methods, but less work has investigated potential risks and differences across meditation methods. We addressed this in a large pre-registered online survey including 613 mediators where we correlated participants' experience with fifty meditation techniques to psychotic-like experiences (PLEs) and mystical experiences. We found a positive correlation for both PLEs and mystical experiences with techniques aiming at red

phase_mapping.bridge_rationale: Emptiness — dissolution of self, DMN decoupling, ego dissolution, nondual awareness.
